name: vmware-monitor

plugins.name: vmware-monitor
plugins.description: VMware vCenter/ESXi read-only monitoring plugin. Query inventory, health, alarms, VM info, snapshots, scan logs. No destructive operations — code-level enforced. Invoke: /vmware-monitor:vmware-monitor / VMware 只读监控插件。查询清单、健康、告警、VM 信息、快照、扫描日志。无破坏性操作 — 代码级保证。命令：/vmware-monitor:vmware-monitor
